# Code Anchors: Taxonomy Drift Advisory

- `libs/portable-tools/src/drift-advisory.ts` — the advisory: per-page neighbor-counting signals (misfile, refinement, sibling note), the deterministic-by-construction community-detection engine for new-domain candidates, the staleness alarm, and the PR-body renderer; always exits zero and writes nothing.
- `libs/portable-tools/src/drift-advisory.spec.ts` — coverage of every threshold, the staleness-replaces-per-page-flags rule, and byte-identical repeat runs.
- `libs/portable-tools/src/generate-atlas.ts` — the shared link-graph construction the advisory imports so it audits the exact graph the atlas is built from.
- `.claude/commands/nxs.distill.md` — Phase 6.3, where the drain runs the advisory over the final store state and pastes its findings into the PR body, never gating.
- `libs/portable-tools/corpus/drift/` — the drift-mode parity corpus: fixture concept pages plus a registry, exercising each finding category.
